verdict.chip: none - TC saved, single GW38, no DGW, no multiplier value
verdict.highest_leverage_action: Switch the armband from Bowen to M.Salah before the GW38 deadline. It is the single highest-leverage move and it is FREE - Salah is already the vice, a confirmed LIV starter in his farewell match, the de facto template captain (~22% share) and the highest floor once Haaland blanks. The armband does NOT auto-cascade to a hauler, so keeping (C) on Bowen while the field pivots Salah is the biggest avoidable rank loss this week.
verdict.reasoning: CLAUDE's plan projects highest (~50.7) and is protocol-correct: the APEX LOCKED rule (captain = season cum_pts leader, nailed premium, not GK) lands on Salah once Haaland is out; intel flags Salah as captain_shield MUST-NOT-MISS and the do-not-fade rule applies because Salah is 100% confirmed to start. GEMINI's plan is effectively identical AFTER its dead Haaland/Gabriel armbands cascade to Salah, so its real output also lands ~50.7 (NOT the void 85). The user already owns the correct 15 and the correct vice (Salah) - the ONLY gap is the armband on Bowen instead of Salah, plus ensuring the Sels/Munoz auto-subs are not stranded by a manual line-up. Bowen-C (RIVAL + USER) is a defensible high-variance rank-chase from 7th, but per the backtest fading the template captain costs points on expectation. Human override clause: if the user has live intel favouring a West Ham boom vs Leeds, Bowen-C is respected - but the default, floor-weighted recommendation is Salah.

highest_leverage_action: Switch captain from Bowen to Salah before the GW38 deadline

mini_league_context: 15-man league. Leader Krisss. on 2365 pts; USER (Puwakies Jjimyang) 7th on 2180 - a 185-pt gap, so the title is gone and this is a final-day rank-defence, not a title chase. With the top out of reach, the floor-correct Salah-C protects against the most likely league-wide swing (Salah is the de facto template captain the field is pivoting to). Default to Salah-C to hold 7th; deploy Bowen-C only as a deliberate gamble against a specific manager you are directly chasing.

GEMINI's Haaland-C and Gabriel-VC are BOTH confirmed out (double armband failure; its 85 xPts is void). Best plan = CLAUDE (~50.7 xPts) - the user's exact squad with the armband on Salah instead of Bowen and clean auto-subs (Sels for Raya, Munoz for Aina/Gabriel). The user already owns the right 15 and right vice; the single highest-leverage, FREE action is to move (C) from Bowen to Salah. No transfer, no chip (TC saved - no DGW).
